channel.title: Combined Politepol Feed
channel.description: Merged feed from multiple Politepol sources

item.title: EU mutual assistance clause is unambiguous: Macron
item.description: The EU's mutual assistance clause is unambiguous, French President Emmanuel Macron said on Saturday, after the bloc's leaders asked officials to prepare a blueprint for how it would work amid doubts over Washington's commitment to NATO. President Donald Trump's criticism of NATO for failing to bac Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: BBC will cut up to 2,000 jobs to reduce costs by about 10pc
item.description: The BBC said Wednesday that it plans to cut up to 2,000 jobs to save 10% of its annual budget - 500 million pounds ($677 million) - over the next two years. The layoffs announced during a call with staff are the biggest in more than a decade at the U.K. national broadcaster. "I know this creates Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Ukraine's Zelenskiy arrives in Jordan for next leg of Gulf tour
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy arrived in Jordan ‚Äãon Sunday as part of a ‚ÄåGulf tour aimed at shoring up defence ties with countries in the region amid ‚Äãrising tensions over the Iran ‚Äãwar. Zelenskiy is seeking support from Gulf ‚ÅÝstates for Ukraine's war against Russia ‚Äãas Western mili Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: France detains two more suspects over foiled Paris Bank of America attack
item.description: French authorities have arrested two more suspects over a ‚Äãfoiled attack on Bank of America‚Äôs Paris offices, the country‚Äôs anti-terrorism prosecutor‚Äôs office said ‚Äåon Sunday. ‚ÄúTwo further individuals were taken into police custody last night as part of the investigatio Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: London Jewish community ambulances set ablaze in antisemitic attack, PM says
item.description: Four ambulances belonging ‚Äãto a Jewish community organisation in north London were set ablaze overnight in what British Prime ‚ÄåMinister Keir Starmer called "a deeply shocking antisemitic arson attack". The London Fire Brigade, which sent six fire engines and 40 firefighters to the scene, said Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Russia says Ukraine controls 15‚Äì17 per cent of Donetsk region
item.description: The Russian-installed head of ‚ÄãUkraine's Donetsk region, ‚ÄåDenis Pushilin, told Russian president Vladimir Putin ‚Äãat a ‚Äãmeeting shown on state ‚ÅÝTV on Tuesday ‚Äãthat Ukraine controls around ‚Äã15-17 per cent of the region. Russia claims the whole of ‚Äãthe Donetsk region as part ‚Äãof Russia and says Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Greece sees deal to buy Italian-made frigates by April, minister says
item.description: Greece hopes to wrap up talks and sign a deal ‚Äãfor the purchase of Bergamini class ‚Äåfrigates from Italy by April, Defence Minister Nikos Dendias said in an interview ‚Äãreleased on Sunday. High-ranking officials from ‚ÄãGreece and Italy last year signed memorandums for ‚ÅÝnaval cooperation, opening Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Slovakia PM Fico to meet EU's von der Leyen to push for restart of Druzhba oil flows
item.description: Slovak Prime Minister Robert Fico said on Sunday he ‚Äåwould meet with EU chief Ursula von der Leyen on Tuesday, as Slovakia and Hungary ramp up pressure on Ukraine to restart Russian oil flows, warning Slovakia could block a major EU ‚Äãloan to Kyiv. Russian oil flows through the Druzhba pipelin Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Explosion hits US embassy in Oslo, causing minor damage, police say
item.description: The US embassy in Oslo was hit by an explosion early on Sunday, causing minor damage but no injuries, Norwegian police said. A loud blast was heard near the embassy compound in western Oslo at around 1am (0000 GMT), and smoke was seen rising from the area, eyewitnesses told local media. "We've de Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Plane carrying newly printed currency crashes, killing 15
item.description: Lockheed C-130 Hercules cargo plane carrying newly printed Bolivian banknotes crashed Friday near the capital, leaving at least 15 people dead, injuring others and damaging numerous vehicles, officials said. Defense Minister Marcelo Salinas said the aircraft skidded off the runway while landing at Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Buses, trams and trains grind to a halt across Germany at start of 2-day strike
item.description: Buses, trams and trains across Germany ground to a halt early Friday as local transport workers heeded a call by the Verdi public sector union to stage a strike on Feb 27 and 28. The union is aiming to gain leverage in negotiations that cover working conditions, specifically working hours and shif Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Cuba situation escalating, humanitarian needs must be solved: Kremlin
item.description: The Kremlin said on Thursday that the situation in Cuba was heating up and called for restraint after a deadly incident with a Florida-registered speedboat off the coast of the Caribbean island. Cuban forces killed four exiles and wounded six others who sailed into Cuban waters aboard a speedboat Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Nobel laureate Mohammadi remains in critical condition in Iran, foundation says
item.description: Jailed Nobel Peace Prize laureate Narges Mohammadi was in critical condition in a cardiac care unit in ‚Äãnorthwestern Iran on Sunday, two days after she was ‚Äåbrought to hospital from prison, a foundation run by her family said. Mohammadi's blood pressure has continued to fluctuate dangerously, Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Kenya death toll from floods, landslides rises to 18 people, police say
item.description: The death toll from flooding and landslides ‚Äãfollowing heavy rains in ‚ÄåKenya has risen to 18 people, the national police service ‚Äãsaid on Sunday. Landslides were ‚Äãreported in Tharaka Nithi, Elgeyo-Marakwe ‚ÅÝand Kiambu counties in ‚Äãcentral and eastern Kenya ‚Äãfollowing sustained heavy rainfall, Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Drone targeted nuclear plant's radiation control laboratory: IAEA
item.description: The Russian-held Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant in southeastern Ukraine informed the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA) on Sunday that a drone had targeted its external radiation control laboratory. There were no reported injuries and it was not yet known if the strike damaged the lab, wh Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Hezbollah pays steep price in battle to reverse its fortunes
item.description: Hezbollah has paid a heavy price for going to war with Israel on Mar 2: Israel has occupied a chunk of southern Lebanon, displaced hundreds of thousands of its Shi‚Äôite Muslim constituents and killed as many as several thousand of its fighters, according to previously unreported casualty estim Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.description: Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.description: Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.description: Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.description: Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.description: Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.description: Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.description: Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.description: Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.description: Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.description: Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Lucrative bets that anticipated Trump's policy surprises warrant scrutiny, experts say
item.description: Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Taiwan's 12 remaining diplomatic allies
item.description: Taiwan President Lai Ching-te arrived in Eswatini on ‚ÄãSaturday on a surprise ‚Äåtrip, after his government blamed Chinese pressure for ‚Äãthe cancellation of a ‚Äãvisit that was meant ‚ÅÝto have taken place ‚Äãlast month. China views democratically ‚Äãgoverned Taiwan as part of its territory with no righ Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Oil tanker hijacked off Shabwa coast: Yemen
item.description: Yemen‚Äôs coast guard said on ‚ÄãSaturday that the ‚ÄåM/T EUREKA oil tanker had been hijacked off ‚Äãthe coast ‚Äãof Shabwa province by unidentified ‚ÅÝarmed men who ‚Äãboarded the vessel, ‚Äãseized control and steered it towards the Gulf of ‚ÄãAden in the ‚Äãdirection of Somali waters. The coast ‚Äågua Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Bangladesh leads ZKTOR‚Äôs privacy-first platform expansion in South Asia
item.description: Bangladesh is emerging as more than an early market in ZKTOR‚Äôs South Asia rollout. It is becoming one of the clearest real-world tests of whether the region is ready for a different model of digital participation. According to the company, the privacy-led Indian social media platform has cro Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Myanmar's military-backed government imposes martial law in 60 townships
item.description: Myanmar's junta leader-turned-president Min Aung Hlaing has issued new emergency ordinances to impose military control in 60 townships, a move aimed at tightening security in regions still mired in conflict despite the transition to civilian rule. The ordinances cover 60 townships across Kachin, K Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Tsunami warning as 7.4 magnitude quake hits off Japan
item.description: An earthquake with a preliminary magnitude of 7.4 struck off the northeastern coast of Japan on Monday afternoon, the Japan Meteorological Agency said. It warned of a tsunami as high as 3 metres (9.84 ft) in Iwate, Aomori and Hokkaido prefectures, reports Reuters. The tremor had an epicentre in t Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Strait ‚Äãof Hormuz ‚Äòcompletely open‚Äô to ships for remainder of ceasefire: Iran FM
item.description: Iran's foreign minister said ‚Äãon Friday that ‚Äåpassage for all commercial vessels through ‚Äãthe Strait ‚Äãof Hormuz is declared ‚ÅÝcompletely open ‚Äãfor the remaining period ‚Äãof ceasefire, in line with the ceasefire ‚Äãin Lebanon. The ‚Äãpassage of vessels through the ‚Äåstrait ‚ÅÝwill be on the coordi Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: India, Pakistan ‚Äòheld multiple back-channel talks‚Äô after Operation Sindoor
item.description: Indian and Pakistani strategic experts, parliamentarians, and former diplomats have participated in at least four back-channel meetings since the high-intensity conflict in May 2025. The first of these engagements took place just two months after Operation Sindoor, according to the Hindustan Times Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Arakan Army vows to take ‚Äòfull control‚Äô of Rakhine State by 2027
item.description: Arakan Army Commander-in-Chief Maj Gen Twan Mrat Naing has said they are expected to secure ‚Äúfinal victory‚Äù in Rakhine State by 2027. He made the comments at an event marking the group‚Äôs 17th founding anniversary on Friday. Since late 2023, the Arakan Army has taken control of 1 Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Police fire tear gas as Noida workers' protest turns violent
item.description: Police lobbed tear gas shells and used "minimum force" on Monday to quell a factory workers' protest in the Indian national capital's suburb of Noida, which turned violent on its fourth day, with vehicles torched and stones pelted in parts of the satellite city. Noida is among the largest planned Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Iran sets 2 months to restore refiners
item.description: Iran expects to restore most damaged refining and distribution facilities to 70‚Äì80 per cent of their pre-attack capacity within one to two months, a senior oil official said, as authorities work to recover from a wave of strikes on energy infrastructure. Deputy Minister of Oil Mohammad Sadeq Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Saudi Arabia restores full capacity on East-West oil pipeline to 7 million bpd after attacks
item.description: Saudi Arabia has restored full oil pumping capacity through the East-West pipeline to about seven million barrels per day, it said on Sunday, days after providing an assessment of damage on its energy sector from attacks during the Iran conflict. The ministry said energy facilities and the pipelin Delivered by PolitePaul service

item.title: Pranay Verma appointed as next Indian ambassador to Belgium, EU
item.description: Pranay Kumar Verma, the Indian high commissioner to Bangladesh, has been appointed as the country‚Äôs next ambassador to Belgium and the European Union. The Indian Ministry of External Affairs made the announcement in a press release on Friday. ‚ÄúHe is expected to take up the assignment Delivered by PolitePaul service
